questions.text: The mean of first 5 natural numbers is:
Mode is the most frequently occurring observation.
questions.explanation: Mode is the value that appears most frequently in a data set.

questions.text: What is the formula for mean of grouped data?
questions.explanation: For grouped data, mean = Σfᵢxᵢ / Σfᵢ, where fᵢ is frequency and xᵢ is class mark.

questions.text: The median divides the data into ________ equal parts.
questions.explanation: Median is the middle value that divides the data into two equal halves.
